DISPLAY_NAME: What operating mode will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select operating mode"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the targeted flash?
DESCRIPTION: "Select flash memory devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: Set flash bus pins to tri-state when not in use
DESCRIPTION: "Select to tri-state all pins interfacing with flash memory device when PFL megafunction does not require an access to the flash memory"

DISPLAY_NAME: How many flash devices will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select number of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the largest flash device that will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select largest density of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the flash interface data width?
DESCRIPTION: "Select flash data width in bits"

DISPLAY_NAME: Allow user to control the flash_nreset pin
DESCRIPTION: "Select to connect reset pin of flash memory device"

DISPLAY_NAME: How many flash devices will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select number of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the flash device density?
DESCRIPTION: "Select density of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the Quad SPI flash device manufacturer?
DESCRIPTION: "Select device manufacturer of the quad SPI flash"

DISPLAY_NAME: Flash support fast speed read
DESCRIPTION: "Select for devices that support fast speed read"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the Quad SPI flash device density?
DESCRIPTION: "Select density of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: How many flash devices will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select number of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the NAND flash device manufacturer?
DESCRIPTION: "Select device manufacturer of the NAND flash"

DISPLAY_NAME: What's the largest flash device that will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select density of flash devices"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the flash interface data width?
DESCRIPTION: "Select flash data width in bits"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the byte address for reserved block area, in hex?
DESCRIPTION: "Specifies the start address of the reserved block area for bad block management"

DISPLAY_NAME: Enable ECC checking for NAND flash operation
DESCRIPTION: "Enables the support for on-die ECC"

DISPLAY_NAME: Flash programming IP optimization target
DESCRIPTION: "Select  flash programming IP optimization"

DISPLAY_NAME: Flash programming IP FIFO size
DESCRIPTION: "Select the FIFO size if you select Speed for flash programming IP optimization"

DISPLAY_NAME: Add Block-CRC verification acceleration support
DESCRIPTION: "Select to add a block to accelerate verification"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the external clock frequency?
DESCRIPTION: "Specify the user-supplied clock frequency for the megafunction to configure the FPGA"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the flash access time?
DESCRIPTION: "Specify the access time of the CFI flash, in ns"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the flash random page read access time?
DESCRIPTION: "Specify NAND flash random page read access time, in us"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the byte address of the option bits, in hex?
DESCRIPTION: "Specify the start address in which option bits are stored in the flash"

DISPLAY_NAME: Which FPGA configuration scheme will be used?
DESCRIPTION: "Select FPGA configuration scheme"

DISPLAY_NAME: What should occur on configuration failure?
DESCRIPTION: "Select configuration behavior after configuration failure"

DISPLAY_NAME: What is the byte address to retry from on failure?
DESCRIPTION: "Specify the flash address for the PFL megafunction to read from reconfiguration for a configuration failure"

DISPLAY_NAME: Include input to force reconfiguration
DESCRIPTION: "Select to enable optional pin for FPGA reconfiguration"

DISPLAY_NAME: Enable watchdog timer on Remote System Update support
DESCRIPTION: "Select to enable watchdog timer for remote system upgrade support"

DISPLAY_NAME: Time period before watchdog timed out
DESCRIPTION: "Specify time out period of the watchdog timer"

DISPLAY_NAME: Ratio between input clock and DCLK output?
DESCRIPTION: "Select ratio between the input clock and DCLK"

DISPLAY_NAME: Use advance read mode?
DESCRIPTION: "Select option to improve overall flash access time for the read process during the FPGA configuration"

DISPLAY_NAME: Enable the enhanced bitstream-decompression block?
DESCRIPTION: "Select to enable or diable the enhanced bitstream decompression block"
